Scene.title: Science Lab
Scene.description: Detention begins; Miss Duane introduces Squish the octopus

Page.StageDirection: Later in the day. School has ended, MISS DUANE is in the science lab with the kids.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Now I know you might think detention bites the big one, but I want you to think of this as a time to have a think about what the rest of this year means for each of you. You can turn it around still. You have the chance to really make an impact on your school and make it the best it can be for everyone!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: What are we doing, Miss?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: You're cleaning that fish tank. And once you've done that, you can help our new friend move in.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Excuse me?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: It's part of our studies on marine life. The grade tens last year voted to get a turtle, but everyone lost interest and the next thing you know, I have to poke it with a pencil so see if it was still alive. Not for a while.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: DUANE

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: That's horrible.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Have you ever had a pet turtle? They eat and die, that's pretty much it. Not particularly exciting. Anyway, the curriculum has shifted a little again, so I thought we could try a new friend this year.

Page.StageDirection: She lifts up a big fishbowl. Inside is a tiny octopus.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Wow, a squid!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Close, Stella. This is an octopus. One of the smartest creatures in the ocean, and maybe even the planet.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Ha! Nerd.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Clean the new tank, and then maybe we can decide on a name. I'll be outside.

Page.StageDirection: She opens Tinder on her phone and leaves. PRIYA pulls out her Switch, and Tony starts eating a full packet of biscuits. STELLA starts tidying the tank.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Its so weird looking. I always thought theyd be cuter.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: It probably thinks we look weird too.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Can I pat him?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: It'll probably sting you. And it'll just stick to you and you won't be able to get rid of it.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: He can pet it.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Do you think he knows what we're saying? Maybe he's hungry. Do they eat biscuits?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Oh my God, no!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm just wondering. I have a curious mind. Don't crush my spirit. | want to see what he feels like.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Just leave him be, Tony. Hes probably still getting used to his environment. Plus, you don't know, he could be dangerous. Some of the smallest creatures of the ocean are the deadliest.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: You're so boring sometimes Stella. Don't you ever want to do anything fun?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I do heaps of fun stuff.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Like what?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Last night I went down this Youtube hole about the history of using/ bronze as ...

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: But that's not really fun though, is it? You have to live a little.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Leave her alone, you ming. Not everyone is meant to be exciting all the time.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: But I'm exciting some of the time, right?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Well ... you're stable. And reliable. That's important too.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Yeah. Like, I'm like this biscuit. Priya and I are the chocolate outside. We're the bits that people remember and love because we taste good and were fun. And you're like the icing in the middle. You keep everything together, but nobody knows what you're actually made of.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I dort want to be icing.

Page.StageDirection: She thinks for a minute for something to do, and then starts attempting to breakdance.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: It's okay, you don't have to do that. You're still our friends.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Stop. It hurts.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Check it dudes!

Page.StageDirection: She attempts a floor routine, but bumps the fish tank, shaking it.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Look out!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I didn't mean to!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Is he okay? Poor little guy.

Page.StageDirection: MISS DUANE returns, still on her phone.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Are we done?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I don't think so, Miss.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Don't worry about it, the guy at the pet store said cleaning wasn't that big of a deal. I also got a bit of a vibe from him. So.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Let's think of a name for him and then we can go home.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: What about Tony?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Sure.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: What about Oscar?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Nice.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: 'Tony?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Snickers?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: 'Tony?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Glitter?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm hearing a lot of support for Tony.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: He's really squishy looking. What about Squish?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: 'That's actually pretty good. Squish.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: That's not fair!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Okay, Squish it is. Sorry, Tony.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: It's okay, his attention span is pretty short.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm wearing new socks today.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Right then, home time. Let's go. Scoot. Out.

Page.StageDirection: They all leave, STELLA is lagging behind.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: That means you too, Stella.

Page.StageDirection: MISS DUANE goes, STELLA goes back to the fish tank.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: It's lovely to meet you, Squish. My name is Stella Bunt. Is it comfy in there? I guess it's pretty different from the ocean, but you'll get used to it. I hope we can get to know each other. I dont really know much about the ocean if I'm being honest. My brother and I watched a movie about a whale and we thought it was going to be funny, but it wasnt. So if anybody tells you to watch Blackfish, maybe say no.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE [off]
DialogueBlock.Line: Stella!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm sorry, listen to me go on. I have to go. You're a good listener, buddy.

Page.StageDirection: She turns to leave. Suddenly, a small pebble is thrown from the tank and hits her in the back of the head, She picks up the pebble and leans in close to the tank. SQUISH slams against the glass, trying to reach STELLA. TONY and PRIYA return and SQUISH goes back to behaving normally.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Stella? Let's go already.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Uh ... you know what's weird?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: What?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I think Squish threw something at me.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: The octopus threw something at you?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: That is stupid. Octopuses can't be that smart. It probably fell out of the roof. Remember when the beehive fell out of the roof in the music rooms?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: But we don't have music rooms.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: We don't now.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: There were a lot of bees.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm just saying stuff like that isn't unusual.

Page.StageDirection: The classroom lights turn off, and the kids leave.
